id.headline: Membangun Hunian Menumbuhkan Harapan
id.subheadline: Developer properti terpercaya dengan 9 kawasan Perumahan berkualitas di Jember

en.headline: Building Homes, Nurturing Hope
en.subheadline: Trusted property developer with 9 quality residential areas in Jember

description.id: Dari hunian, Diamond Group secara konsisten mendorong inovasi kuat untuk membangun masa depan yang lebih baik.
description.en: From housing, Diamond Group consistently drives strong innovation to build a better future.

title.id: Diamond Group Raih Penghargaan Best Developer 2025
title.en: Diamond Group Wins Best Developer Award 2025

excerpt.id: Diamond Group kembali menorehkan prestasi dengan meraih penghargaan Best National Property Developer dalam ajang Indonesia Property Awards 2025.
excerpt.en: Diamond Group once again achieves excellence by winning the Best National Property Developer award at the Indonesia Property Awards 2025.

title.id: Peluncuran Diamond Heights: Hunian Premium di Jantung Kota
title.en: Launch of Diamond Heights: Premium Living in the Heart of the City

excerpt.id: Kawasan hunian premium terbaru dengan konsep mixed-use development yang terintegrasi dengan pusat komersial.
excerpt.en: Latest premium residential area with mixed-use development concept integrated with commercial centers.

title.id: Komitmen Sustainability: 1000 Pohon Ditanam di Diamond Valley
title.en: Sustainability Commitment: 1000 Trees Planted at Diamond Valley

excerpt.id: Sebagai bagian dari program Go Green, Diamond Group menanam 1000 pohon di kawasan Diamond Valley untuk menjaga kelestarian lingkungan.
excerpt.en: As part of the Go Green program, Diamond Group plants 1000 trees in the Diamond Valley area to preserve the environment.

title.id: Ekspansi Regional: Diamond Group Hadirkan Proyek di 3 Kota Baru
title.en: Regional Expansion: Diamond Group Presents Projects in 3 New Cities

excerpt.id: Melanjutkan strategi pertumbuhan, Diamond Group mengumumkan pengembangan kawasan residensial di Surabaya, Semarang, dan Medan.
excerpt.en: Continuing growth strategy, Diamond Group announces residential area development in Surabaya, Semarang, and Medan.

description.id: Peluncuran kawasan super premium dengan teknologi smart home dan fasilitas eksklusif. Dapatkan promo spesial dan hadiah menarik!
description.en: Launch of super premium area with smart home technology and exclusive facilities. Get special promos and attractive prizes!

description.id: Pameran properti terbesar dengan penawaran khusus untuk semua proyek Diamond Group. DP 0%, cicilan ringan, dan bonus menarik!
description.en: The biggest property exhibition with special offers for all Diamond Group projects. 0% down payment, easy installments, and attractive bonuses!

description.id: Kunjungi rumah contoh dan unit ready stock kami. Konsultasi gratis dengan tim properti expert dan dapatkan harga spesial hari ini!
description.en: Visit our show houses and ready stock units. Free consultation with property expert team and get special prices today!

description.id: Pelajari strategi investasi properti yang menguntungkan bersama para ahli. Gratis untuk umum, dapatkan e-certificate!
description.en: Learn profitable property investment strategies with experts. Free for public, get e-certificate!
